title: Australian Smoked Chicken Wrap
description: A gluten-free and flavorful chicken wrap filled with crunchy and smoky goodness. Made with australian ingredients, this recipe is perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: crunchy slaw mix
ingredients.notes: made with shredded cabbage, carrots, and a hint of vinegar

instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crunchy slaw mix and chinese chili sauce.
Warm the australian wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the slaw mix, placing the cooked chicken breast on top, and finishing with a handful of leaf lettuce.
